title: erigeron schalbusii
intro: Erigeron schalbusii, also known as the Alpine Fleabane, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Erigeron schalbusii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Erigeron schalbusii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically used to treat colds, fever, and other minor ailments.
